DSOA - Disability Support for Older Australians

fields.label: Description
fields.value: Active Support Plan - completed with Bernie, signed and provided copy to her. Most recently reviewed May 2022.

fields.label: What is important to me?
fields.value: My dog Kobe and my best friend Harry.

fields.label: How I like to be supported
fields.value: I like to attempt to do things for myself and will request additional support if I need it.

fields.label: Medical History
fields.value: Allergic to Hay, only mild and flares up asthma. Uses a puffer as required.

fields.label: Morning
fields.value: Wake up and brush my teeth, shower. Require support. See manual handling plan

fields.label: Provide any details about regular activity attendance
Dressing
fields.value: Assistance to get clothes from cupboard and dress me, I will tell you what I would like to wear

fields.label: Hair Care
fields.value: I manage this myself, sometimes I may request assistance if my arm is tired.

fields.label: Shaving
fields.value: I can do this myself in the shower

fields.label: Showering
fields.value: Assistance to transfer to my shower chair from wheelchair, I wash myself then need assistance back to my wheelchair

fields.label: Household tasks where support or assistance is required
Mobility Detail
fields.value: Bernie is in a wheel chair and requires support to get in and out. Manual handling plan details requiremets.

fields.label: Support Required for Eating and Drinking
Favourite/preferred foods and drinks
fields.value: love cappuccino with almond milk and favourite snack is popcorn

fields.label: Transport Arrangements
fields.value: Can catch public transport provided its wheelchair accessible.

fields.label: Name
fields.value: Independently transfer from wheelchair to shower chair

fields.label: Goal
fields.value: Independently transfer from wheelchair to shower chair

fields.label: Support required to achieve this goal
fields.value: Assist Bernie build upper arm strength and get work with her OT on how to safely transition and build strength.

fields.label: Name
fields.value: Independently transfer from wheelchair to shower chair

fields.label: Goal
fields.value: Independently transfer from wheelchair to shower chair

fields.label: Support required to achieve this goal
fields.value: Assist Bernie build upper arm strength and get work with her OT on how to safely transition and build strength.

fields.label: Progress Taken Towards Goal
fields.value: Bernie's OT has attended and provided a transition plan. This will be reviewed in 12 months time.

fields.label: How does Support Receiver feel about the goal progress?
fields.value: Bernie is feeling positive, there is a plan in place and she has made a start on this.

fields.label: What are the next steps
fields.value: Continue following the exercises in the OT report. At 12 month review OT will assess the next steps of reviewing the existing manual handling plan for transfer.
